nodes.name: Horornis
nodes.summary: Horornis（Horornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Philippine bush warbler、日本树莺、远东树莺等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: Fiji bush warbler
nodes.summary: Fiji bush warbler（Horornis ruficapilla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Fiji bush warbler。

nodes.name: Fiji bush warbler
nodes.summary: The Fiji bush warbler (Horornis ruficapilla) is a species of bird in the family Cettiidae. It is endemic to the islands of Fiji. There are four subspecies occurring on all the main islands of the group. The species has been afforded its own genus, Vitia, in the past, but similarities of egg colour, song and morphology place it firmly within the Horornis bush-warblers. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Fiji bush warbler (Horornis ruficapilla) is a species of bird in the family Cettiidae. It is endemic to the islands of Fiji.
